commands.review_summary:
The PR makes root `openclaw --help` render live plugin CLI descriptors when plugin config can affect commands, adds LanceDB `ltm` help metadata, updates memory docs, and adds CLI/launcher coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. The linked issue has live v2026.5.18 output showing advertised `memory` commands failing as unknown, and current source shows `memory` is plugin-owned while root help can be precomputed without active slot awareness.
commands.review_followup: The protected `maintainer` label makes this an explicit maintainer review/merge item, and there is no narrow automated repair to queue.

target.title: Fix memory plugin CLI help dispatch
target.body:
Summary
- Make root CLI help config-sensitive when plugin configuration can affect plugin command descriptors.
- Keep `openclaw memory` owned by `memory-core`; when the memory slot selects `memory-lancedb`, root help advertises `ltm` instead.
- Register LanceDB memory CLI help metadata for `ltm` and document the `memory-core` vs `memory-lancedb` command surfaces.

Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/command-registration-policy.test.ts test/openclaw-launcher.e2e.test.ts src/cli/root-help-live-config.test.ts src/entry.test.ts src/cli/run-main.exit.test.ts src/plugins/cli.test.ts src/plugins/loader.cli-metadata.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 openclaw.mjs test/openclaw-launcher.e2e.test.ts src/cli/root-help-live-config.ts src/cli/root-help-live-config.test.ts src/cli/run-main.ts src/entry.ts src/entry.test.ts src/cli/run-main.exit.test.ts src/cli/command-registration-policy.ts src/cli/command-registration-policy.test.ts extensions/memory-lancedb/cli-metadata.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm tsgo:prod`
- `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview`

Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: `openclaw --help` no longer advertises `memory` when the active memory slot is `memory-lancedb`; it advertises the LanceDB-owned `ltm` command instead, while `openclaw memory status` remains unavailable for that plugin.
Real environment tested: AWS Crabbox, provider `aws`, lease `cbx_21482d2389af`, run `run_0f5bf37991f0`, Ubuntu host with Node 24.15.0 and pnpm 11.1.0.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: remote `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`, `pnpm build`, then `node openclaw.mjs --help`, `node openclaw.mjs memory status`, `node openclaw.mjs ltm --help`, plus launcher legacy config, `$include`, and invalid-config help checks under temporary `OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR`/`OPENCLAW_HOME` configs selecting `memory-lancedb`.
Evidence after fix: `help_has_memory=no`, `help_has_ltm=yes`, `memory_status_exit=1`, `memory_status_unknown=yes`, `ltm_help_ok=yes`, `legacy_help_ok=yes`, `include_help_ok=yes`, `invalid_config_help_exit=0`, `fix_proof_ok=yes`.
Observed result after fix: root help matches the configured memory plugin command surface, `openclaw memory status` fails through the normal unknown-command path for `memory-lancedb`, and `openclaw ltm --help` shows the LanceDB memory plugin help.
What was not tested: no live LanceDB/OpenAI embedding operation was executed; this PR changes command discovery/help dispatch, not vector storage behavior.

Fixes #83745
target.author: joshavant
